overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban commercial district. The player moves through covered plazas, an indoor NCART transit station with cyan neon lighting, and elevated walkways, encountering pedestrians and cyberpunk city architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with reflective water feature

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered plaza toward the NCART station entrance, passing benches and planters

entered.detail: glass panel railing surrounding a reflective water feature with green lighting
futuristic transit station facade with large illuminated NCART signage
bright cyan neon sign with NCART logo and Japanese text
structural metal beams supporting the covered walkway roof
tall digital screen displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian plaza at night, with a glass-railed water feature on the right reflecting neon lights. The camera moves forward toward the NCART transit station entrance, passing concrete benches and trees while pedestrians walk through the wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with distinctive orange neon lighting

events.description: orange neon overhead lights become prominent as camera turns left into covered walkway
camera begins ascending concrete stairs toward upper level

agents.ego_description: turning left into a covered walkway with orange neon lights, then ascending concrete stairs

notable_agents.action: descending stairs toward camera wearing casual futuristic clothing

entered.detail: large rectangular orange neon light fixtures hanging from ceiling
wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
tall modern building with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a covered walkway illuminated by distinctive warm orange neon lights overhead. The environment shifts from the open plaza to a more enclosed space with dense tree canopies and concrete planters. The camera then begins ascending a wide concrete staircase, passing pedestrians coming down.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor transit station with commercial shops and cyan neon lighting

events.description: entering indoor NCART station from covered walkway, lighting shifts to cyan neon

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy indoor transit station, passing shops and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: standing at pawn shop counter browsing items

entered.detail: dark ceiling with grid pattern and embedded cyan neon light strips
long linear cyan neon lights running length of station ceiling
shop counter with purple neon lighting and merchandise displays
large cylindrical digital screen showing animated advertisements
scattered trash bags and debris typical of cyberpunk urban setting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into the indoor NCART transit station, where the lighting shifts dramatically to cool cyan neon strips along the ceiling. The polished floor reflects the neon glow. The camera moves through the station passing various commercial shops including a pawn shop with purple lighting, while pedestrians navigate the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with large mural and stairway

events.description: exiting indoor station into open plaza with night sky visible and large mural wall
beginning ascent of wide concrete stairs in the plaza

agents.ego_description: exiting the station into an open plaza and ascending wide concrete stairs past groups of people

notable_agents.action: group of four people standing and conversing near the mural wall

entered.detail: open paved area with night sky visible above between tall buildings
wide concrete staircase leading to upper plaza level
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art with blue tones
free-standing digital screen displaying animated character advertisements
small trees and greenery planted in concrete planters

segments.scene_description: Exiting the station, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza under the night sky. The camera moves toward and begins ascending a broad concrete staircase flanked by a large graffiti-covered mural wall on the right. Groups of pedestrians gather and converse near the mural, while holographic advertisements glow on pedestals.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with monorail track and city overlook

events.description: red monorail train passes on elevated track to the left of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway observing the passing monorail train and distant city lights

notable_agents.action: red monorail train moving along elevated track parallel to walkway

entered.detail: narrow concrete pedestrian walkway elevated above street level
metal railings along the edge of the elevated walkway
futuristic red train moving on elevated tracks with illuminated windows
distant city buildings with various lights and neon signs
concrete and metal bridge structure passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along an elevated concrete walkway with metal railings overlooking the city. A red monorail train passes by on tracks to the left, moving through the futuristic cityscape. The walkway is flanked by brutalist concrete architecture, with the distant city skyline visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district, transitioning from a reflective pedestrian plaza into a transit hub and finally onto an elevated urban walkway. It begins by moving through a covered plaza past a glass-railed water feature and wet pavement before turning left into a sheltered walkway defined by warm orange neon lights and dense tree canopies. As the camera ascends a wide staircase, the environment shifts dramatically into the indoor NCART transit station, where the lighting turns to cool cyan strips reflecting off polished floors and purple-lit storefronts. The scene then opens back into the night air at a wide plaza, moving past a graffiti-covered mural and holographic advertisements while climbing another set of broad stairs. Finally, the camera reaches an elevated concrete walkway with metal railings, overlooking the futuristic skyline as a red monorail train glides past through the brutalist architecture.
